response.global_analysis: The video features gameplay dialogue. The character Gigi Murin speaks English, while the NPC 'Grems' speak in stylized vocalizations. I have used the on-screen dialogue boxes as the primary source for the Grems' intended speech, as per the decoding hierarchy. Timing is strictly aligned with the vocal audio waveforms. There is no vocal music, so the reference JSON's 'no song' status is confirmed. Long phrases have been split to adhere to character limits.

subtitles.original: Oh, is this yours? I found it down in the sewer.
subtitles.english: Oh, is this yours? I found it down in the sewer.

subtitles.original: If you want it back, throw the ring into the volcano.
subtitles.english: If you want it back, throw the ring into the volcano.

subtitles.original: Oh cool, thanks. I'm gonna go now.
subtitles.english: Oh cool, thanks. I'm gonna go now.

subtitles.original: If you dare throw it away,
subtitles.english: If you dare throw it away,

subtitles.original: Meat... I'm so hungry. I can't save justice like this.
subtitles.english: Meat... I'm so hungry. I can't save justice like this.

subtitles.original: Hey! Who told you you could eat that?!
subtitles.english: Hey! Who told you you could eat that?!

subtitles.original: You... You don't like my hat?
subtitles.english: You... You don't like my hat?

subtitles.original: No, no. I think your hat is lovely.
subtitles.english: No, no. I think your hat is lovely.

subtitles.original: Lovely? Really? You can eat as much meat as you want!
subtitles.english: Lovely? Really? You can eat as much meat as you want!

subtitles.original: By the way, I'm looking for a straw hat.
subtitles.english: By the way, I'm looking for a straw hat.

subtitles.original: Any idea where I can find one?
subtitles.english: Any idea where I can find one?

subtitles.original: I'll trade it if you complete my quest.
subtitles.english: I'll trade it if you complete my quest.

subtitles.original: I want 26 pictures of giant rats.
subtitles.english: I want 26 pictures of giant rats.

subtitles.original: Where do I find one of those?
subtitles.english: Where do I find one of those?

subtitles.original: family photos of all 26 of them!
subtitles.english: family photos of all 26 of them!

subtitles.original: Whoa! So this is a family of 26 rats?
subtitles.english: Whoa! So this is a family of 26 rats?

subtitles.original: I guess I can see why you want pictures of them.
subtitles.english: I guess I can see why you want pictures of them.

subtitles.original: I'll get pictures of all 26 of them!
subtitles.english: I'll get pictures of all 26 of them!

subtitles.original: Get in the frame! Let me get a picture of you!
subtitles.english: Get in the frame! Let me get a picture of you!

subtitles.original: One of them doesn't even look like a rat.
subtitles.english: One of them doesn't even look like a rat.

subtitles.original: What are you doing? You're not even a rat!
subtitles.english: What are you doing? You're not even a rat!

subtitles.original: And look at those! They look just like Justice!
subtitles.english: And look at those! They look just like Justice!

subtitles.original: And look at this photo I took! And this one! And this one!
subtitles.english: And look at this photo I took! And this one! And this one!

subtitles.original: They're so cute! All these rats are so cute!
subtitles.english: They're so cute! All these rats are so cute!

subtitles.original: And this is a yummy looking rat! Yay!
subtitles.english: And this is a yummy looking rat! Yay!

subtitles.original: Yay! Now I have two items!
subtitles.english: Yay! Now I have two items!

subtitles.original: Maybe I can get the Honkshoe from the stables.
subtitles.english: Maybe I can get the Honkshoe from the stables.

subtitles.original: A few more quests might cheer you up!
subtitles.english: A few more quests might cheer you up!

subtitles.original: You should take the ring to...
subtitles.english: You should take the ring to...

subtitles.original: It's like no one cares about me.
subtitles.english: It's like no one cares about me.

subtitles.original: This cruel evil world... The stables!
subtitles.english: This cruel evil world... The stables!

subtitles.original: Oh no, I think he's sleeping.
subtitles.english: Oh no, I think he's sleeping.

subtitles.original: Okay, I think I can just... Don't mind if I...
subtitles.english: Okay, I think I can just... Don't mind if I...

subtitles.original: You don't need this, do you?
subtitles.english: You don't need this, do you?

subtitles.original: I've done it! I've gathered all three items!
subtitles.english: I've done it! I've gathered all three items!

subtitles.original: I am the hero of this kingdom!
subtitles.english: I am the hero of this kingdom!

subtitles.original: You probably didn't think I'd get them all, but I did.
subtitles.english: You probably didn't think I'd get them all, but I did.

subtitles.original: I got everything because I am the hero!
subtitles.english: I got everything because I am the hero!

subtitles.original: Oh wow, you really managed to
subtitles.english: Oh wow, you really managed to

subtitles.original: There's something special just for you!
subtitles.english: There's something special just for you!

subtitles.original: Ah man, can't believe I got everything.
subtitles.english: Ah man, can't believe I got everything.

subtitles.original: Does that mean I saved Justice?
subtitles.english: Does that mean I saved Justice?

subtitles.original: Oh they're gonna be so proud of me!
